headline: Patriots Focus On Protection While The Celtics Take Control In Philly
morning_brew: The Pats are finally getting serious about protecting the franchise. Caleb Lomu out of Utah at pick twenty-eight is a move I can get behind. The offensive line was a sieve last year, and you cannot have Drake Maye running for his life every Sunday. They followed it up by grabbing Gabe Jacas and Eli Raridon later in the draft. Love it, this is a blue-collar haul that fills some massive holes on this roster.

Over on the hardwood, the C's took care of business in Philly with a hundred-eight to hundred win. Jayson Tatum and Jaylen Brown both dropped twenty-five, which is exactly what you need from your stars on the road in the playoffs. They looked composed even when the crowd at the Xfinity Mobile Arena got loud. Payton Pritchard gave them a massive spark off the bench with fifteen points and some big buckets.

Then you have the Sox, who are making it real hard to keep the faith right now. They got absolutely smoked by the O's in a ten-three disastah. Brayan Bello did not even make it out of the fourth inning, giving up eight earned runs and thirteen hits. That is a brutal outing for a guy we are supposed to trust as an ace. Ten hits from the bats did not matter when you are down by a touchdown before the beer man even gets to your row.

trend_watch.trend: Eight earned runs and thirteen hits in three and a third innings against Baltimore.
trend_watch.dans_take: Absolutely brutal start for the kid on a night when we needed a stopper.

trend_watch.trend: Dropped twenty-five points and seven assists in a road playoff win.
trend_watch.dans_take: JT looked like the best player on the floor when it mattered most in that fourth quarter.

trend_watch.trend: Went two for four with a home run in the blowout loss.
trend_watch.dans_take: One of the few guys actually showing a pulse in this lineup during this losing streak.

news_digest.headline: New England Patriots' 2026 NFL draft picks: Selection analysis
news_digest.dans_take: Love seeing the focus on the trenches to protect the future of this team.

news_digest.headline: Jayson Tatum, Jaylen Brown come up big in Celtics' 'fun' Game 3 win
news_digest.dans_take: This is exactly how your two best players are supposed to play on the road in the postseason.

news_digest.headline: Adley Rutschman blasts 2 HRs as O's offense erupts to drub Red Sox
news_digest.dans_take: Absolutely brutal night for the pitching staff down in Baltimore.
